title: ContractPortfolio
intent: Portfolio-wide contract extraction, risk indexing, and renewal intelligence
requirements: contracts module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
clause-extraction module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
obligations module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
risk-scoring module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
renewals module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
counterparties module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
